message.content:
@startuml
actor ElementModel as EM1
participant CardModel as CM1
box "Publish" #LightBlue
  participant Publish
end box
participant StringCard as SC1
participant ElementView as EV1
participant DeckView as DV1
database IOTech as IO1
rectangle DeckTechView as DTV1

EM1 ->> CM1 : encode each CardModel\ncreate
CM1 --> SC1 
SC1 -->> CM1 
CM1 -left-> EM1 : return \nStringCardCollection 

activate EM1
note left of EM1 **encode**
deactivate EM1


activate EM1
note left of EM1 send
EM1 right--> Publish :send StringCardCollection  
EV1 <-right- Publish :send StringCardCollection   
IO1 <-- EV1 :Store StringCardCollection    
deactivate EM1



show...>DV1:GetDeckView\ create
DTV1<--IO1:return Show(StringCardCollection)  

@enduml
